description:
Operating Area: Greece

The Ferretti 550 combines Italian elegance with flawless functionality, offering unmatched comfort across every area—from the inviting interior salon to the spacious flybridge, bow, and aft decks. Ideal for those seeking the perfect blend of ample space and outstanding performance, this yacht promises an unforgettable experience across Greece’s mesmerizing blue horizons. She sleeps up to 6 guests on board.

crew.name: Savvas Zografinakis
crew.bio:
When it comes to luxury yacht charters, the captain is the heart of the experience. Captain Savvas Zografinakis is not just a highly skilled navigator—he is the embodiment of professionalism, safety, and first-class service. With extensive experience in the yachting industry and a solid background in the Greek Navy, Captain Savvas brings a wealth of expertise to every journey aboard Carte Blanche.

From an early career, Savvas has mastered the art of seamanship. His hands-on experience in yacht operations, problem-solving under pressure, and commitment to excellence ensure that every guest on Carte Blanche enjoys a seamless and luxurious voyage.

Fluent in English and Greek, with strong leadership and communication skills, Captain Savvas excels in creating unforgettable charter experiences. He is an expert when it comes to tailor-made itineraries for discerning guests, and he ensures safety, comfort, and adventure in perfect harmony.
With Captain Savvas at the helm, every journey aboard Carte Blanche is more than just a trip—it’s an extraordinary escape into the world of refined yachting.

crew.name: Haris Kostidis
crew.bio:
Haris is a remarkable Steward, whose expertise, dedication, and warm hospitality create an unforgettable experience for every guest aboard Carte Blanche. Haris has built a reputation for excellence. His keen eye for detail and intuitive understanding of guest needs make him an invaluable member of the Carte Blanche crew.

Beyond his technical prowess, Haris brings a unique set of skills that elevate every charter. His passion for cuisine adds a personal touch to the dining experience, delighting guests with every bite.

Whether expertly handling mooring lines, maintaining the yacht in immaculate condition, or going above and beyond to create a warm and welcoming atmosphere, Haris is more than just a crew member—he’s the heart and soul of your luxury voyage.
